title: Warlover
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''Warlover''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser]] that attempted to destroy a cargo supply cache in the [[Esyram system/Legends|Esyram system]] that the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Valorous (MC80 Star Cruiser)|''Valorous'']] was attempting to retrieve.

==Behind the scenes==
The outcome of the Imperial attack depends on which side the player takes.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]''
